ODM.Description: NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form - Template (for XML distribution)

GlobalVariables.StudyName: NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form - Template (for XML distribution)
GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: This file contains the metadata, events, and data for REDCap project "NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form - Template (for XML distribution)".
GlobalVariables.ProtocolName: NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form - Template (for XML distribution)
GlobalVariables.redcap:ProjectNotes: NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form - Template (for XML distribution)

redcap:Reports.title: Export NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Records
redcap:Reports.description: This report can be downloaded as a CSV file and uploaded to NACC Data Platform via ADRC portal or API.

MetaDataVersion.Name: NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form - Template (for XML distribution)

Question.TranslatedText: Record ID

Form header ADRC: {adcid:icons} Please enter your Center's ID. If you are unsure of it, you can reference this list of current ADCIDs in the NACC Data Platform. PTID: {ptid:icons} PTID (may be referred to as Participant ID or local ID) is the ADRC-managed participant ID. Formats vary by each center; this is the ID used for UDS (uniform dataset) identification internally. Form Date: {frmdate_enrl:icons} Examiner's initials: {initials_enrl:icons} Form version number {formver:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
Form header  
ADRC: {adcid:icons} Please enter your Center's ID. If you are unsure of it, you can reference this list of current ADCIDs in the NACC Data Platform.
PTID: {ptid:icons} PTID (may be referred to as Participant ID or local ID) is the ADRC-managed participant ID. Formats vary by each center; this is the ID used for UDS (uniform dataset) identification internally.
Form Date: {frmdate_enrl:icons}  
Examiner's initials: {initials_enrl:icons}  

Form version number

 

 {formver:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: ADCID
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: ADCID

Question.TranslatedText: PTID
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: PTID

Question.TranslatedText: Form date
Examiner's initials
Form version number (See bottom of current form for version number)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
Form version number

(See bottom of current form for version number)

Question.TranslatedText: INSTRUCTIONS: Submit this form to assign NACCIDs for first-time participants at the time of consent or to transfer an existing participant to your center from a different center.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: INSTRUCTIONS: Submit this form to assign NACCIDs for first-time participants at the time of consent or to transfer an existing participant to your center from a different center.

Question.TranslatedText: 1. NACCIDs must be assigned at the time of consent for all participants that will be a part of the UDS. If a new participant at your center will participate in the UDS (even if this UDS data will be submitted later), you must assign them a NACCID at the time of consent. This NACCID will accompany all data (for any data type - e.g. SCAN, CLARiTI, or other data streams) that are submitted to the NACC Data Platform for this participant. A NACCID is assigned at the time of consent regardless of what data type will be submitted to the NACC Data Platform first. To procure a NACCID for this participant using this form, select 'Assign NACCIDs for first-time participants'. Transfer a participant from one site to another: ADRCs can transfer existing participants from one ADRC to another using this form. This can be done by the new ADRC that the participant is joining. To transfer a participant to your center, select 'Transfer a participant to your site'. {enrltype:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
1.

NACCIDs must be assigned at the time of consent for all participants that will be a part of the UDS.  If a new participant at your center will participate in the UDS (even if this UDS data will be submitted later), you must assign them a NACCID at the time of consent. This NACCID will accompany all data (for any data type - e.g. SCAN, CLARiTI, or other data streams) that are submitted to the NACC Data Platform for this participant. A NACCID is assigned at the time of consent regardless of what data type will be submitted to the NACC Data Platform first. To procure a NACCID for this participant using this form, select 'Assign NACCIDs for first-time participants'.  

 

Transfer a participant from one site to another: ADRCs can transfer existing participants from one ADRC to another using this form.  This can be done by the new ADRC that the participant is joining. To transfer a participant to your center, select 'Transfer a participant to your site'. 

 {enrltype:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 1. Is this a first time NACCID assignment or a transfer for the participant?
2. Participant's month and year of birth {enrlbirthmo:icons} (YYYY) {enrlbirthyr:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 2. Participant's month and year of birth  {enrlbirthmo:icons} (YYYY) {enrlbirthyr:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 2a. Participant's month of birth
2b. Participant's year of birth

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (1850 - 2030). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (1850 - 2030). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: 3. How many years of education has the participant completed? {enrleduc:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
3.

How many years of education has the participant completed?

 {enrleduc:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 3. How many years of education has the participant completed?
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 3. How many years of education has the participant completed?

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) that best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply) {loc_enrl_gender:icons} Introduction for the participant: The next question asks about your gender identity. By gender identity, we mean the inner sense that you have of yourself as being a man, woman, or a different gender. Gender identity can be different from your sex assigned at birth or your sexual orientation, and it can change over time.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
4.

Which term(s) that best describes the participant's current gender identity?

(Select all that apply)

 {loc_enrl_gender:icons}

 

Introduction for the participant: The next question asks about your gender identity. By gender identity, we mean the inner sense that you have of yourself as being a man, woman, or a different gender. Gender identity can be different from your sex assigned at birth or your sexual orientation, and it can change over time.

ItemDef.Name: loc_enrl_gender___1
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: For displaying checkboxes on the data entry screen. Use the calculated fields ENRLGENMAN, ENRLGENWOMAN, ENRLGENTRMAN, ENRLGENTRWOMAN, ENRLGENNONBI, ENRLGENTWOSPIR, ENRLGENOTH, ENRLGENDKN, ENRLGENNOANS for all reports and data sets.

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)

ItemDef.Name: loc_enrl_gender___2
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: For displaying checkboxes on the data entry screen. Use the calculated fields ENRLGENMAN, ENRLGENWOMAN, ENRLGENTRMAN, ENRLGENTRWOMAN, ENRLGENNONBI, ENRLGENTWOSPIR, ENRLGENOTH, ENRLGENDKN, ENRLGENNOANS for all reports and data sets.

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)

ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: For displaying checkboxes on the data entry screen. Use the calculated fields ENRLGENMAN, ENRLGENWOMAN, ENRLGENTRMAN, ENRLGENTRWOMAN, ENRLGENNONBI, ENRLGENTWOSPIR, ENRLGENOTH, ENRLGENDKN, ENRLGENNOANS for all reports and data sets.

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)

ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: For displaying checkboxes on the data entry screen. Use the calculated fields ENRLGENMAN, ENRLGENWOMAN, ENRLGENTRMAN, ENRLGENTRWOMAN, ENRLGENNONBI, ENRLGENTWOSPIR, ENRLGENOTH, ENRLGENDKN, ENRLGENNOANS for all reports and data sets.

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)

ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: For displaying checkboxes on the data entry screen. Use the calculated fields ENRLGENMAN, ENRLGENWOMAN, ENRLGENTRMAN, ENRLGENTRWOMAN, ENRLGENNONBI, ENRLGENTWOSPIR, ENRLGENOTH, ENRLGENDKN, ENRLGENNOANS for all reports and data sets.

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)

ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: For displaying checkboxes on the data entry screen. Use the calculated fields ENRLGENMAN, ENRLGENWOMAN, ENRLGENTRMAN, ENRLGENTRWOMAN, ENRLGENNONBI, ENRLGENTWOSPIR, ENRLGENOTH, ENRLGENDKN, ENRLGENNOANS for all reports and data sets.

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)

ItemDef.Name: loc_enrl_gender___9
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: For displaying checkboxes on the data entry screen. Use the calculated fields ENRLGENMAN, ENRLGENWOMAN, ENRLGENTRMAN, ENRLGENTRWOMAN, ENRLGENNONBI, ENRLGENTWOSPIR, ENRLGENOTH, ENRLGENDKN, ENRLGENNOANS for all reports and data sets.

Question.TranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 4. Which term(s) best describes the participant's current gender identity? (Select all that apply)

Question.TranslatedText: Please specify how the participant describes their gender {enrlgenothx:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: Please specify how the participant describes their gender {enrlgenothx:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 4ga. Please specify how the participant describes their gender
Gender-Man
Gender-Woman
Gender-Transgender man
Gender-Transgender woman
Gender-Non-binary/genderqueer
Gender-Two-spirit
Gender-participant uses a different term
Gender-Don't know
Gender-Prefer not to answer
5. Does the participant have a NIA GUID? About the NIA GUID {guidavail:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
5.

Does the participant have a NIA GUID?

About the NIA GUID

 {guidavail:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 5. Does the participant have a NIA GUID? About the NIA GUID
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
5. Does the participant have a NIA GUID?


About the NIA GUID

Question.TranslatedText: 5a. Please provide the NIA GUID? {guid:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 5a. Please provide the NIA GUID? {guid:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 5a. Please provide the NIA GUID (10-digit alpha-numeric format. Ex: NIH012ABC34DE)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
5a. Please provide the NIA GUID

(10-digit alpha-numeric format. Ex: NIH012ABC34DE)

Question.TranslatedText: 6. Has the participant been previously enrolled at another ADRC? {prevenrl:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 6. Has the participant been previously enrolled at another ADRC?  {prevenrl:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 6. Has the participant been previously enrolled at another ADRC?

It looks like you indicated at the top of the form that this is a Transfer. However, your answer to the above question does not align. Please adjust either the enrollment type or your answer to the above question.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: It looks like you indicated at the top of the form that this is a Transfer. However, your answer to the above question does not align. Please adjust either the enrollment type or your answer to the above question.

6a. At which ADRC was this participant previously enrolled? 
Please enter the previous Center's ID. If you are unsure of it, you can reference this list of current ADCIDs in the NACC Data Platform.		 {oldadcid:icons}
6b.   Please provide the previous PTID (if known):

PTID (may be referred to as Participant ID or local ID) is the ADRC-managed participant ID. Formats vary by each center; this is the ID used for UDS (uniform dataset) identification internally. If unknown, leave blank.		 {oldptid:icons}

ItemDef.Name: oldadcid
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Please enter the previous Center's ID. If you are unsure of it, you can reference this list of current ADCIDs in the NACC Data Platform.

Question.TranslatedText: 6a. At which ADRC was this participant previously enrolled?
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 6a. At which ADRC was this participant previously enrolled?

Question.TranslatedText:
6b. Please provide the previous PTID (if known):
PTID (may be referred to as Participant ID or local ID) is the ADRC-managed participant ID. Formats vary by each center; this is the ID used for UDS (uniform dataset) identification internally. If unknown, leave blank.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
6b. Please provide the previous PTID (if known):

PTID (may be referred to as Participant ID or local ID) is the ADRC-managed participant ID. Formats vary by each center; this is the ID used for UDS (uniform dataset) identification internally. If unknown, leave blank.

Question.TranslatedText: Same center?
It looks like you have entered your own ADRC. Please change your response to indicate the participant's previous ADRC.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: It looks like you have entered your own ADRC. Please change your response to indicate the participant's previous ADRC.

Question.TranslatedText: 7. Is the NACCID for this participant known? {naccidknwn:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 7. Is the NACCID for this participant known?  {naccidknwn:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 7. Is the NACCID for this participant known?

7a. Please provide the NACCID:
All NACCIDs begin with "NACC" and are 10 characters long {naccid:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
7a. Please provide the NACCID:

All NACCIDs begin with "NACC" and are 10 characters long		 {naccid:icons}

Question.TranslatedText:
7a. Please provide the NACCID:
All NACCIDs begin with "NACC" and are 10 characters long
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
7a. Please provide the NACCID:

All NACCIDs begin with "NACC" and are 10 characters long

Question.TranslatedText: 8. Please re-enter the participant PTID before completing the form: {ptidconf:icons}
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: 8. Please re-enter the participant PTID before completing the form:  {ptidconf:icons}

Question.TranslatedText: 8. Please re-enter the participant PTID before completing the form:
The PTID you entered does not match the PTID at the beginning of this form. Please double-check the entries and ensure that the PTIDs match to submit this form.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: The PTID you entered does not match the PTID at the beginning of this form. Please double-check the entries and ensure that the PTIDs match to submit this form.

Question.TranslatedText: NATIONAL ALZHEIMER'S COORDINATING CENTER | naccmail@uw.edu | naccdata.org NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form (Version 1.0, January 2025)
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
NATIONAL ALZHEIMER'S COORDINATING CENTER | naccmail@uw.edu | naccdata.org
NACC Participant Enrollment/Transfer Form (Version 1.0, January 2025)

Question.TranslatedText: Complete?

Decode.TranslatedText: Transfer a participant to your site

CodeList.Name: loc_enrl_gender___1
CodeList.redcap:CheckboxChoices: 1, Man | 2, Woman | 3, Transgender man | 4, Transgender woman | 5, Non-binary/genderqueer | 6, Two-Spirit | 7, Use a different term | 8, Don't know | 9, Prefer not to answer
